message:
refactor(engine): replace manual isqrt_i128 implementations with stdlib unsigned_abs().isqrt()

Four modules each had their own Heron's/Babylonian method implementation
for integer square root of i128. Replace all with the standard library's
u128::isqrt() via unsigned_abs(), which is correct, branchless, and
eliminates the manual loop and clippy allow annotations.

Affected modules: counterfactual_evaluator, spectral_fleet_convergence,
stdlib, workload_embedding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
